active_sales.name: Steam Summer Sale 2026
active_sales.note: Store-wide seasonal sale. Push a countdown banner on all Steam key/account listings — Arc Raiders, EA FC 26, GTA V Enhanced, F1 25, Gothic 1 Remake.

new_releases.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced
new_releases.why_it_matters: Major Ubisoft nostalgia remake, $59.99 standard/$69.99 Deluxe. Strong pre-order/launch-day demand expected.

new_releases.title: Palworld 1.0
new_releases.why_it_matters: Huge early-access fanbase; 1.0 launch is a natural re-engagement moment.

new_releases.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved
new_releases.why_it_matters: Full Unreal Engine 5 remake of a flagship franchise; broad appeal.

streamer_trends.why_it_matters: Multi-hour daily streams driving a viewer spike; loot.tn already stocks Arc Raiders Steam keys at a Summer Sale price.
Regularly trends on YouTube gaming with FC 26 content; strong overlap with loot.tn's EA FC key/account buyers.

recommendations.action: Add a Steam Summer Sale countdown banner on the homepage, ends Jul 9
recommendations.reason: loot.tn already stocks the exact titles on sale platform-wide (Arc Raiders, EA FC 26, GTA V Enhanced) but shows no sale-event branding or urgency.

recommendations.action: List Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced and Palworld 1.0 as launch-week featured items
recommendations.reason: Both release within days; capturing launch-week search traffic is time-sensitive.

recommendations.action: Keep GTA VI pre-order promos visible in every newsletter through November
recommendations.reason: Long sales runway before the Nov 19 release; steady, low-effort recurring revenue.

site_notes: This is a seed entry based on manual research on 2026-07-03. Once the GitHub Action runs, this file will be replaced with a fresh daily report.
